query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) total, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT idNumber) distinct_id, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN idNumber IS NULL OR idNumber = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) null_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN idNumber LIKE 'NO_ID%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) no_id_prefix,
  SUM(CASE WHEN createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) last_7d
FROM clients WHERE workspaceId = 1;
